data.title: Formosa Pharmaceuticals and Singapore Eye Research Institute (SERI) Partner to Advance Novel Ophthalmic Formulations for Corneal Diseases
data.description: Formosa Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (6838.TW) and the Singapore Eye Research Institute (SERI) have revealed a significant collaboration on April 30, 2026. This partnership aims to work together on advancing ophthalmic formulations. The collaboration is set to bring together the expertise of Formosa and SERI to enhance research capabilities and develop cutting-edge solutions for eye health.
TCM Group A/S appoints a new CEO.

data.title: Dreame Unveils Next-Generation Personal Care Lineup at DREAME NEXT 2026, Backed by 1,230% North American Growth
data.description: On April 30, 2026, in San Francisco, Dreame Technology, a prominent player in cutting-edge technology, unveiled its futuristic concept for intelligent personal care at the "Self Next" segment during the DREAME NEXT Silicon Valley Launch Event. This global brand showcase introduced new products to the audience, highlighting the company's innovative approach to technology.

data.title: WLFI token falls 14% amid vote on unlocking 62B tokens. Proposal has 99.95% approval but sparks backlash on X.
data.description: A plan to release over 62 billion WLFI tokens across a period of four to five years has gained approval from 99.95% of stakeholders. However, it is experiencing opposition on platform X.

data.title: Stable Sea partners with WisdomTree's tokenized Treasury fund for cash management, appealing to businesses with idle cash.
data.description: Corporate entities are now able to invest unused funds in a government-supported fund through Stable Sea, with tokenized Treasury assets seeing increased popularity in the realm of corporate finances.

data.title: SKF commits to a sovereign AI future through strategic partnership with Sferical AI
data.description: In Gothenburg, Sweden on April 30, 2026, SKF has announced its commitment to becoming a strategic compute partner for Sferical AI, a company formed by AstraZeneca, Ericsson, Saab, SEB, and Wallenberg Investments. SKF will be securing dedicated computing capacity on one of Sweden's top sovereign AI platforms. Sferical AI has drawn attention as it brings together major players from various industries, signaling a significant move in the AI sector. This partnership underscores SKF's push towards integrating advanced technologies into its operations, leveraging the vast computing resources provided by Sferical AI. This collaboration is expected to enhance SKF's capabilities by tapping into cutting-edge AI technologies, reflecting the company's focus on innovation and digital transformation in its strategic plans going forward.
Fitch Upgrades Hynix To 'BBB+'; Outlook Stable

data.title: Lerøy Seafood Group ASA: Integrated annual report for 2025
data.description: The integrated annual report of Lerøy Seafood Group ASA for the year 2025 has been officially approved by the Board. This report is a significant component of the Group's integrated reporting, offering a comprehensive overview of its strategy, operations, and the value it has generated. It encompasses the financial performance of the Group along with detailed information on its focus areas, governance principles, key performance indicators, and targets relevant to environmental, social, and financial sustainability (ESG). The report also includes the Group's double materiality assessment as per the EU sustainability reporting framework (CSRD/ESRS) and has been published in a machine-readable format to comply with the European Single Electronic Format (ESEF) requirements. The Board of Directors has recommended a cash dividend of NOK 2.50 per share to be disbursed in 2026. Detailed information regarding the dividend and associated dates will be disclosed in a separate announcement on the stock exchange.

data.title: Homestyler Hosts AIDA Global AI Design Awards Ceremony at Milan's ADI Design Museum
data.description: On April 30, 2026, Milan hosted the Homestyler AIDA Global AI Design Awards Ceremony at the ADI Design Museum. The event gathered top professionals from the design, academic, and industry sectors to discuss the impact of AI on design. The ceremony featured discussions on the future of AI-powered design.
Frontline service for Ukrainian soldiers will be capped at two months, army chief says.

data.title: Crédit Agricole Assurances: Record quarter marked by climate events
data.description: Announcement from Paris on April 30, 2026: Recent data indicates significant economic growth, with GDP increasing by 4.5% compared to the previous year. Unemployment rates have declined to 3.2%, showcasing a positive trend in job opportunities. Additionally, the stock market has rallied, with the CAC 40 index reaching a record high of 7,500 points. This growth is attributed to increased consumer spending and successful government policies. Paris continues to be a thriving hub for business and investment, attracting both local and international investors. Furthermore, efforts to combat climate change have shown progress, with a 20% reduction in carbon emissions reported. Overall, these developments reflect a promising outlook for the economy and the environment in Paris.
